name: Data schema & manifest
description: Unified data manifest (src/data/manifest.py, JSONL) for tracking screenshot provenance, source, timestamps. Collection scripts write to data/manifest.jsonl.

name: Demo data pipeline & viewer
description: Parse pro demos with awpy into full-tick Parquet + metadata JSONs. Interactive demo viewer at /viewer with radar, vision cones, kill lines, timeline scrubbing. 4 demos parsed (Furia vs Vitality: Mirage/Inferno/Nuke/Overpass, 83 rounds, 563 kills).

name: Screenshot-demo synchronization
description: Capture CS2 screenshots via demo playback (netcon TCP automation) and pair with ground truth game state from Parquet. Mirage done (548 screenshots, 1504 labels). Inferno/Nuke/Overpass have capture plans but need CS2 demo playback on Windows.

name: SFT training — visual grounding
description: SFT on Qwen3.5-35B-A3B MoE to teach the model to read the HUD correctly. Input: screenshot. Target: structured game_state JSON matching demo ground truth. LoRA on vision + language layers. Validates that model can accurately extract health, armor, weapons, player counts, etc.

name: GRPO dataset from demos
description: Convert demo snapshots into decision training format. Each sample: game state snapshot → pro behavioral features (d_move, d_obj, u_type, e_timing, δ_engage from next Δ ticks) + round_won + player_contribution (φ: damage, survival, objective). Ground truth schema defined in D013.

name: Data sparsity diagnostic
description: Pre-training diagnostic that measures state bucket coverage across the dataset (D023). Computes hierarchical bucketing (Level 0-2) over game states, reports contrastive pair availability, within-bucket behavioral variance, and simulated R_outcome within-group variance. Results at 4 demos: L0 96.2% coverage (23/30 buckets), L1 27.0% (89/2167). L0 marginal, L1 not viable. Script: scripts/sparsity_diagnostic.py.

name: Small-scale GRPO smoke test — B-site post-plants
description: End-to-end GRPO pipeline test on a small slice: B-site post-plant rounds across all 4 demos (36 rounds, ~200-400 planning frames). Skip SFT, use base Qwen3.5-35B-A3B. Verify: training loop runs, rewards differentiate between completions, gradients flow, loss decreases. Estimate ~20-30 min on H200. Steps: (1) extract B-site post-plant samples from Parquet, (2) build GRPO-format dataset, (3) run training, (4) check reward variance and loss curves.

name: RECALL — Retrieval-based advantage estimation
description: kNN retrieval over tactical game state embeddings to compute counterfactual outcome rewards during GRPO training. Encode states as ~25-dim vectors, index in FAISS, retrieve K neighbors, compute advantage A(s,a) = Q̂(s,a) - V̂(s). Replaces R_decision and R_outcome as primary strategy signal. Implementation: src/training/recall.py.

name: GRPO training — strategic reasoning
description: GRPO on demo-derived decision data (D013 architecture). Multiplicative format gate + 3 reward signals: R_percept (0.20, merged field accuracy), R_decision (0.30, behavioral feature alignment), R_outcome (0.50, outcome-modulated with player contribution φ). KL regularization (λ=0.02). Sparsity diagnostic (F05a, D023) must run first to quantify reward signal quality at current data scale.

name: Evaluation & analysis
description: Per-field accuracy, decision quality, consistency scores across models. Compare SFT-only vs SFT+GRPO. Write up findings.
